water.name: Sespe Creek and tributaries above Alder Creek confluence

authorities.name: California Department of Fish and Wildlife
U.S. Geological Survey (Geographic Names Information System)

sources.title: CCR T14 §7.50(b)(134) — Sespe Creek and tributaries above Alder Creek confluence (Ventura Co.)
sources.quotedText: (134) Sespe Creek and tributaries above Alder Creek confluence (Ventura Co.).  All year. Only artificial lures with barbless hooks may be used.  0 trout

sources.title: California Fish and Game Code §7145 — Sport Fishing License Requirement
sources.quotedText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...

sources.title: USGS GNIS (The National Map Gazetteer) — Streams layer record for gaz_id 269472, "Alder Creek", Stream, CA, Ventura Co. (mouth point, marking its confluence with Sespe Creek)
sources.quotedText: Alder Creek mouth/confluence point (gaz_id 269472): 34.5647118, -118.9545444, cross-checked against the hometownlocator.com GNIS mirror ("7 mile long tributary of Sespe Creek") and against Sespe Creek's own GNIS stream record (gaz_id 273633, whose course passes directly between this point's neighboring vertices). Used to anchor the water record's coordinate; correcting the file's prior coordinate (-118.97, 34.6), which sat ~4.2km from the true confluence location.

parameters.note: Covers Sespe Creek and its tributaries above the Alder Creek confluence, deep within the Sespe Wilderness of Los Padres National Forest, Ventura Co.

regulations.humanSummary: Open to catch-and-release fishing all year

parameters.note: Only artificial lures with barbless hooks may be used.

regulations.humanSummary: Only artificial lures with barbless hooks may be used
regulations.verbatimText: Only artificial lures with barbless hooks may be used.

parameters.counting_rule: Zero trout may be retained; all trout caught must be released unharmed.

regulations.humanSummary: Zero trout bag limit — catch and release only

parameters.note: Anglers 16 years of age or older must have a valid California sport fishing license.

regulations.humanSummary: California sport fishing license required for anglers 16+
regulations.verbatimText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...
